highlights.text: HT Chip pool — paste your unequipped chip stash and see every chip with set / slot / rarity / bound-HT / stat filters. Heavy Mothership HC-9999 gets its own tab after Blade Angel showing the 7 chips you've equipped on it.

Inventory restructured — Item tab now sorts by category. Filter chips for Skills, Titan Gear, Enigma, Gems, Formation, Units, Chests, Speed-ups, Combat Buffs, and HT Items. Pick what you're looking for instead of scrolling 1,000 things.

Gem rollup — your scattered gem packs collapse into one cell at the top showing your total. Click it for the full breakdown including gems hidden inside boxes (max-case per open). Top of the page shows direct + boxed + total potential gems.
Resource rollups — Odinium, Food, and Oil packs each collapse into one cell with K/M/B totals. Click to see every contributing pack.
Quantities >9,999 now show comma separators. Aggregates use compact K/M/B with full numbers on hover.
Enigma Beast filters — filter by Primary stat and Secondary stat (in addition to element + field) so you can hunt for beasts with the exact buffs you want.
Bug fix — Water and Wind beast elements were swapped (icon was right, label was wrong). Fixed across Enigma viewer, Battle Report, and Armory Report. Thanks Gary!

Inventory tab — your full bag, right inside your report. Item, Unit, Decor, Hero, and CPNT all in one place. Decor splits into Sets and Other so it's easier to find things. Tap anything to see what it does.
Bench Beasts — there's a new Update Bench button on the Beasts tab. Add the beasts you haven't deployed yet so the tab shows your whole collection, not just the ones in your battle reports.

Decor Upgrade Helper (beta) — click the wizard hat button on the Decoration tab. Pick the stats you want to boost (March Size, Damage, HP, etc.) and we rank the decor upgrades that give you the most boost per Universal Decor Shard. Decor pairs that don't stack are flagged, and random Lucky Chests are called out separately since you can't predict what's inside.

Unlock with your UID (S2864 only) — to upload your own bag or bench, you'll be asked for your in-game UID once as a key. We use it to check you're really an S2864 player, then forget it. Friends you share your report with can view your stuff but can't change it.
Bookmarklet help, all in one spot — the steps for setting up the bookmarklet on your phone or computer now live right inside the paste box, so you don't have to hop between pages.
Synced across your devices — your inventory and bench follow you everywhere you open your report, and they show up for anyone you share your report link with.
Polish round — around 40 missing inventory icons added, unit names cleaned up so they show levels instead of game-internal labels, popups centered properly, and you can see how fresh each upload is.
Player Report System — paste up to 6 battle report IDs to build a full account report with an animated setup wizard
One-stop-shop view: Heroes & Gear, Decorations, Base Skins, Enigma Beasts, and HT Chips all in one place
Save & Share shortcodes — generate a 4-character code to share or sync your report across devices
Sticky header with identity, language switcher, settings, and saved config management
Not Owned decoration tracker, beast bench view, hex chip layout, city skill modals, and more
Overview redesigned — compact summary chips (gear score, avg/hero, decor sets with level breakdown, beasts/HTs) and SVG donut chart for branch breakdown
New Gear Score formula — 400 refine + 600 rune per slot, normalized so maxed 1-star runes score equal to maxed 3-star runes. Click 'How is this calculated?' for the full breakdown
Top Heroes cards now show a refine/rune split bar scaled to the absolute max (6000) with '% of max' indicator
Top 3 Enigma Beasts section on Overview (sorted by deployed level)
Heroes & Gear: Group by March toggle — organize heroes into collapsible march sections with Unassigned fallback
Manage Marches: hero list now alphabetical and prevents picking the same hero in multiple slots
Decorations: DMG Boost splits into DMG Increase / Decreased DMG; Others splits into ATK / HP / Capacity
Base Decor: cards now show Equipping and Holding in Stock buff sections; Frostwoven Echo + Photonuclear Fusion display full stats
Base Decor + Base Skins: A-Z sort default with additional sort options
Decor Sets: fully-owned sets now show 'Complete' tag; unplaced components get a yellow border instead of being dimmed (set bonus is active regardless)
Roll quality colors updated to match game tiers: light blue (0-25%), purple (25-50%), yellow (50-70%), green (70%+)
Rune tooltip system — click any rune on the armory report to see its description with actual values at the current star level
Mobile tab bar no longer bounces/overscrolls sloppily
10 missing rune templateIds now resolve correctly (verified against live game TABLE)
Metric chips are now clickable — tap any chip to jump to its relevant tab (e.g., Enigma Beasts chip opens the Enigma Beasts tab)
Rune Progress by Hero — overview shows top 6 heroes with actual rune icons and star badges per gear slot, click to drill into Heroes & Gear
Rune % scaling — progress is now measured against max stars of equipped runes, so a hero with all maxed 1-star runes correctly shows 100%
Gear score breakdown tooltip — click the refine/rune progress bar on any hero card to see full Refine/Rune/Total with %-of-max
Beasts/HTs split into separate Enigma Beasts and Heavy Troopers metric cards
Decor sets level text now reads '19 Level 1, 2 Level 5' instead of 'Lv1:19'
Mobile rune layout: 2-column grid matching titan gear convention (Pistol/Backarmor/Optics left, Headset/GPS/Boots right)
'How is this calculated?' modal added for rune progress, explaining %-based scaling with a worked example
Armory report polish — march groupings now persist and sync via shortcodes, page-nav widget in the header, and a UX pass across gear cards, chips, and the overview
Battle reports entered in the armory wizard are archived to the battle data repository automatically
New Auction House / Merchant Guild reference page — listing rules, bidding, red envelopes, three-way gift shop (Auction Coin / Revenue Coin / Mega Discount), convoy restocks, and trivia
Loot Quest Collectibles catalog — 4 themes (Faces, Dinosaurs, Arms, China) covering 40 items + 4 Grail artifacts with icons
5 evolved-form base skins added, mecha icons restored on the HT Chips tab, security hardening on report collection, and general code cleanup
Storm Duel — new strategy page for the Storm Duel event, with a battlefield map, time-gated stages, lane split, squad/role assignment, silos, debuff items, and stage-keyed strategy
Storm Duel: Round 7 results — post-match Result tab with 290-player merit rankings, victory recap, and player/leader avatars
Storm Duel: Buffs tab with per-buff in-battle caps so wasted excess is surfaced clearly
Storm Duel: Google Translate language switcher in the header, with smart skips for player / alliance / leader names
Storm Duel landing card replaces the Storm's Eye beta card on the homepage
Formation V2 view added to the armory report and battle report viewer — see formations, components, talents, and Component Mastery progression
SSC Map: Round 8 data published — sector 53 post-reshuffle, 33 declarations, 8 Neutral Cities owned
SSC Map: sector power index, Neutral City capture flow, and contested-rank view added
Battle Plan rebuilt as a data-driven R8 tactical view — Recommended Focus Order, threat model, NC details, and contested fight cards written in plain English
Battle Plan: 2-Hop and 3-Hop Neutral City pathway sections with a collapsed view for the 3-hop list
Battle Plan: opponent details modal replaces the inline meta pill row
Battle Plan: buff projection now shows the value you'd get if all declarations win, plus mobile layout fixes
Enigma Beast Viewer — load any battle report to inspect beast deployments, field buffs, and activation conditions
Battle Report: Enigma Beast Comparison — side-by-side attacker vs defender beast breakdown
Guest identity: change display name + set 4-digit server number
Battle report ID passthrough between pages — no re-pasting needed
Version badge + "What's New" release notes — track site updates from the landing page
First-visit popup for major releases — auto-shows once per major version
Feedback always accessible — no identity required for anonymous submissions
Mobile layout improvements — side-by-side buttons, expanded navigation wheel
Decor Index: Base Decoration & Base Halo tabs — view castle effects and halos from battle reports
Battle Report: Base decoration comparison in decoration modal
Magic Egg Hat + 2 new Easter decorations added to index and battle report viewer
HT Chip Viewer — inspect Heavy Trooper chip loadouts, set bonuses, and random attributes from any battle report
Battle Report: HT Chips comparison button — one-click access to chip viewer for loaded reports
Storm's Eye Battle Companion — interactive map with live phase timer, building positions, and timing for the SSC Round 4 neutral city battle
One-tap Battle Companion Alerts — subscribe to push notifications 1 min before each key event (Stations, Hubs, Clusters, Boss, Burn Stage)
Storm's Eye accessible from nav wheel and Beta Features modal for identified S2864 players
Battle Report: fixed Enigma Beast field buff percentages displaying 100x too high
Battle Report + HT Chips: mixed chip sets now show dominant set with correct breakdown
Battle Report: base skin names now use correct game data (289 skins, was 129 with wrong names)
Stats Comparison: Standard, Simplified, and Group by Type filter modes — view buffs by category, folded into unit branches, or grouped by Army/Navy/Air Force
Stats Comparison: combined source drill-down — tap a simplified stat to see collapsible breakdowns per contributing buff with independent decoration drill-through
Stats Comparison: new Defense category with per-branch DEF stats (Army/Navy/Air Force) now visible
HT Chips: complete chip lookup table (268 to 354 entries) — all legendary chips across all sets now display correctly
HT Chips: set bonus calculation fixed — core chip excluded from slot count, only core's set grants 2/4/6 bonuses
HT Chips: chip layout now matches in-game arrangement (1/2/3 left, 4/5/6 right)
Feedback widget now includes battle report ID when submitting from report-linked pages
UD Sector Map — interactive grid with wasteland ownership, neutral cities, and round-by-round history
Battle Report: Hero Equipment modal — view exclusive skills, titan gear, runes, and stats
Great Offers Preview page — pricing breakdowns with real-cost JPY conversion
Easter 2026 event page with wishing well mechanics
Site-wide dark/light theme toggle and Google Translate on all pages
Battle plan page with squad assignments and position mapping
Feedback widget on all beta pages
Push notifications v2 with per-event reminders and alliance targeting
Battle Report Viewer — decode any PvP report with hero, decoration, and unit breakdowns
Decoration Index — 300+ decorations with levels, buffs, mutual exclusives, and suit sets
Base Skins Index — 287 castle skins with city skills and decorative effects
Heroes Database — 139 heroes with skills, stats, and type filters
UD Treasury Distribution system with fair allocation methodology
Calendar with custom events, tag filtering, and daily backup
Notification inbox and Armory Report with rune system
Server 2864 landing page with orbital navigation wheel
UD Calendar with seal stone schedule
Google Translate integration and language picker
Rockfield text guide and defense guide
